## Checklist
- [ ] I edited **`collaborative-perception.bib`** (the single source of truth), not `README.md` directly.
- [ ] Each new entry has taxonomy `keywords` (see [`tools/README.md`](../tools/README.md)) and a `doi` or `eprint` so the Paper link resolves.
- [ ] Papers beyond the survey's March-2024 cutoff are tagged `CP-Snowball`.
- [ ] I regenerated artifacts with `bash run_workflow.sh` and committed the resulting `README.md` / figures.
- [ ] `git diff` shows only the intended changes.
